calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Raul S. Picardo, Esq. appeared for plaintiff USA Gateway, Inc., dba G.T.T. International
Manuel Revalo, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Rowena Gabe.
Default was entered against defendant on June 19, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 18, 2009.

Plaintiff introduced the following Exhibits:

Exhibit 1---Summary of Accounts, dated 06/29/09--------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff USA Gateway, Inc., dba G.T.T. International, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rowena Gabe as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,077.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $34,502.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
